name: Physos
comment: Physos brings large-scale output with feature-rich effects in an IP-rated form factor that's sure to outshine. A 1,000W 7,500K LED engine delivers over 58,000 lumens of output with a native 4.7 - 58deg zoom range that achieves incredible throw distances. A full CMY + CTO color mixing system plus 2 dichroic color wheels inclusive of two High-CRI filters gives fantastic color rendering. A generous FX arsenal includes two rotating gobo wheels, a fully rotating animation wheel, dual prisms, iris, and full blackout framing shutters. With an IP65 rating and weighing less than 90lbs, PHYSOS comes in an industry-leading compact and lightweight form factor for its class and is capable of quick pan/tilt movements all while packing everything you expect from a fully-featured profile!

A 1,000W 7,500K LED engine delivers over 58,000 lumens of output with a native 4.7 - 58deg zoom range that achieves incredible throw distances. A full CMY + CTO color mixing system plus 2 dichroic color wheels inclusive of two High-CRI filters gives fantastic color rendering. A generous FX arsenal includes two rotating gobo wheels, a fully rotating animation wheel, dual prisms, iris, and full blackout framing shutters. With an IP65 rating and weighing less than 90lbs, PHYSOS comes in an industry-leading compact and lightweight form factor for its class and is capable of quick pan/tilt movements all while packing everything you expect from a fully-featured profile!
